commit.subject: LU-0000 mgc: config lock leak
commit.message:
LU-0000 mgc: config lock leak

Test sanity 901 second version in the absence of the
related fix from LU-11185.

Test-Parameters: trivial envdefinitions=ONLY=901 testlist=sanity,sanity
Change-Id: I11c2deed1a6eb61d46e552b29005ce354d3a54c8
Signed-off-by: Aurelien Degremont <degremoa@amazon.com>
Signed-off-by: Alexander Boyko <alexander.boyko@hpe.com>
